leadText: The Kangaskhanite (Japanese: ガルーラナイト Garuranite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Kangaskhan to Mega Evolve into Mega Kangaskhan.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Kangaskhan (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Kangaskhanite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Kangaskhan if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Kangaskhanite from Kangaskhan. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Kangaskhan, the Kangaskhanite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Kangaskhan when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Kangaskhan will remain a Mega Kangaskhan until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Kangaskhan (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Kangaskhanite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Kangaskhan if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Kangaskhanite from Kangaskhan.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Kangaskhan hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Kangaskhan hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. P E One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. This stone will enable Kangaskhan to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Kangaskhan holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Glittering Cave (requires an upgraded Mega Ring ) OR AS Pacifidlog Town S M US UM Battle Tree (64 BP ) P E Indigo Plateau ZA Stone Emporium (after completing Main Mission 09: "Chase That Mysterious Pokémon!" ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period X Y Pokémon Center Battle Championship Kangaskhan Japan May 26 to June 1, 2014 June 23 to July 6, 2014 OR AS Spring 2015 Kangaskhan Japanese, Taiwanese April 3 to 9, 2015
